rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to ports or features visible at that level.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contract elements.
generic_rules: Input envelope assumptions should reference concrete bounds or named constants.
Output guarantees must relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
Component type contracts should not use implementation-only subcomponent paths.
Ensure type alignment between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use eq for equation declarations in AGREE with proper type matching.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Avoid using Boolean domain values as integers in range comparisons.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Subcomponent port usage in component type contracts
